Travel Scams

Guides covering fake holiday listings, advance-fee travel fraud, and ticket scams.

Travel Scams

Holiday Booking Scams in the UK: How to Protect Yourself

Holiday booking scams targeting UK travellers are increasingly sophisticated, with criminals creating convincing fake websites and posing as legitimate travel agents. This guide covers common scam tactics, red flags to watch for, verification steps before booking, and what to do if you suspect fraud. Protect your money and personal data by understanding how these scams work and following practical safety measures.

Updated 2026-04-17

Travel Scams

Travel Booking Scam Checklist: Hotels, Holiday Lets, and Fake Confirmation Emails

What to check before paying for accommodation or travel bookings through unfamiliar sites or messages.

Updated 2026-03-27

Beat the Scam

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.
